positive: A stylized, geometric celestial map featuring constellations and mythological animals rendered in a vibrant, interconnected line art style. The central composition showcases a stylized, rearing griffin surrounded by minimalist, glowing constellations (Orion, Ursa Major, etc.). Use a deep indigo and midnight blue palette accented by electric gold and pearlescent white linework. The overall aesthetic should be clean, sophisticated, and high-contrast, like a modern scientific poster merged with cosmic folklore. Perfect for a repeat print pattern or a central graphic on apparel. Strong silhouette definition, flat graphic style, clean lines, centralized composition, highly detailed pattern elements, elegant, occult, cosmic art.
negative: blur, deformed, ugly, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, text, logo, writing, copyright, gradient, muddy colors, messy, low detail, grayscale, photorealistic, solid color fill
